ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student who created the project */,
  "year" TEXT /* Academic year in which the project is being submitted */,
  "branch" TEXT /* Branch of engineering (e.g., Mechanical, Civil) */,
  "ur_number" TEXT /* Unique registration number of the student */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Title of the project */,
  "guide_id" INTEGER /* ID of the faculty guide assigned to the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the project was submitted */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Current status of the project */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the project submission file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_guide_id FOREIGN KEY ("guide_id") REFERENCES faculty ("guide_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_branch FOREIGN KEY ("branch") REFERENCES branches ("branch_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES project_status ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "registration_number" TEXT /* Unique registration number assigned to the student */,
  "branch" TEXT /* Branch of engineering the student belongs to */,
  "year" TEXT /* Current academic year of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the student */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the student record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the student record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faculty" (
  "guide_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each faculty guide */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the faculty member */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department in which the faculty member works */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the faculty member */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or title of the faculty member */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the faculty member */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the faculty record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the faculty record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guide_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "branches" (
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each branch of engineering */,
  "branch_name" TEXT /* Name of the branch (e.g., Mechanical, Civil) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the branch */,
  "head_of_department" INTEGER /* ID of the head of the department */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the branch record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the branch record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("branch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_branches_head_of_department FOREIGN KEY ("head_of_department") REFERENCES faculty ("guide_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each academic year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Name of the academic year (e.g., IV) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the academic year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the academic year */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the year record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the year record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the status record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the status record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project being reviewed */,
  "guide_id" INTEGER /* ID of the faculty guide providing the feedback */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback comments on the project */,
  "date_provided" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was provided */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Numerical rating given by the faculty */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the feedback was provided */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the feedback record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_feedback_guide_id FOREIGN KEY ("guide_id") REFERENCES faculty ("guide_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_feedback_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system login */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., student, faculty, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., login, view project) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the log entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "submissions" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission record */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project submitted */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date of submission */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Status of the project at the time of submission */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the project submission file */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the submission was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES project_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
